title: Luxury Collection
desc_1: An elevated journey through Sri Lanka's most iconic destinations,
desc_2: featuring 5-star comfort and professional local expertise.

epicurean.title: The Sapphire Journey
epicurean.desc: A curated sequence of discovery and comfort. From standard express handling to final sunset, every moment is hand-crafted for excellence.

itinerary.title: Private Arrival: Express
itinerary.description: Personalized greeting at the arrival terminal. Direct assistance with baggage and a smooth transition to your waiting private vehicle.

itinerary.title: Elite Chauffeur Transit
itinerary.description: Direct transfer via premium SUV to your first destination. Refreshments, Wi-Fi, and curated fine dining stops for lunch are provided for a seamless transition.
itinerary.details: Premium SUV x 24/7 Availability + Gourmet Lunch Picks

itinerary.title: 5-Star Collection & Gastronomy
itinerary.description: Check-in to the island's most iconic signature resorts with ocean or jungle views. Enjoy secure Half-Board (HB) dining featuring signature breakfasts, sought-after dinner reservations, and local organic delicacies.

itinerary.title: Immersive Discovery
itinerary.description: Explore sacred sites and hidden gems with an elite National Guide. Private after-hours access to selected monuments can be arranged for an additional charge.

itinerary.title: Rejuvenating Wellness
itinerary.description: Daily opportunities to unwind with premium Balinese or Ayurvedic spa therapies, designed to revitalize mind and body.

itinerary.title: Elegant Departure
itinerary.description: Leisurely morning at your resort followed by a direct premium transfer to the airport for your stress-free departure.

signature.desc: Seven days. Seven chapters of the real Sri Lanka — ancient cities, misty highlands, surf, and the warmth of Galle Fort.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Colombo
itinerary.experience: Welcome to Sri Lanka. The city greets you with colour, energy, and flavour.
highlights: Arrival & hotel check-in
Galle Face Green sunset stroll
Colombo city tour by private SUV
Street food tasting in Pettah market
itinerary.note: Ease into the island. Let Colombo come to you.

itinerary.title: Drive North to the Ancient Kingdom
itinerary.experience: A scenic morning drive into the heart of the Cultural Triangle.
highlights: Morning premium SUV ride to Sigiriya
Boat ride on a local village lake
Traditional village lunch on the water
Evening elephant gathering at Minneriya

itinerary.title: Sunrise, Rock & Sky
itinerary.experience: The most unforgettable day — from the sky to the summit.
highlights: Pre-dawn hike to Pidurangala for sunrise
Walking breakfast in the jungle
Private guided climb of Sigiriya Lion Rock
Hot air balloon ride & sky lunch
itinerary.note: This day is the heart of the journey.

itinerary.title: The Sacred Hill Capital
itinerary.experience: Kandy — where history, faith, and beauty converge.
highlights: Drive to Kandy via cultural sites
Archaeological museum visit
Private guided visit to the Temple of the Sacred Tooth
Evening Kandyan cultural show

itinerary.title: The Scenic Train to Ella
itinerary.experience: One of the world's most beautiful train journeys — through mist, tea, and cloud.
highlights: Scenic railway journey through the highlands
Check-in at Ella boutique property
Afternoon relaxation and leisurely stroll
Evening hike to Little Adam's Peak
itinerary.note: Let the highlands slow you down.

itinerary.title: Waves, Surf & Soul
itinerary.experience: The south coast in all its laid-back, sun-soaked glory.
highlights: Drive down to Weligama Bay
Private surf lesson on the bay
Fresh seafood lunch by the ocean
Evening yoga and meditation session
itinerary.note: This day is about presence, not pace.

itinerary.title: Homeward via the Fort City
itinerary.experience: A leisurely farewell through one of Asia's most storied colonial cities.
highlights: Morning stroll through Galle Fort (UNESCO)
Visit ancient Dutch churches and ramparts
Street food tour — hoppers, kottu & lime juice
Scenic coastal drive back to Colombo
itinerary.note: End of journey. Sri Lanka at its finest.

philosophy.title: Iconic Standards
philosophy.desc: The Luxury Tier is designed for travelers who seek the best of the island with absolute comfort. From top-tier room categories at 5-star resorts to elite-level guides, we ensure a world-class standard at every turn.

grid.title: Signature Resorts
grid.desc: Exclusive access to the most iconic room categories in 5-star properties.

grid.title: Premium SUV
grid.desc: Luxurious, late-model SUV transport for all land-based movements.

grid.title: National Guides
grid.desc: Elite English-speaking guides with deep knowledge of history and culture.

grid.title: Standard Express
grid.desc: Smooth airport greeting and luggage assistance. (VIP Handling available on request).

seclusion.title: Elite Curation
seclusion.desc: Every accommodation and experience is personally vetted for the highest standard.

access.title: Deep Discovery
access.desc: Beyond sight-seeing: gain true insight through our most experienced National Guides.

items: Private Premium SUV & Elastic Driver Support
Entrance Fees to All Major Sites
Daily Ayurvedic or Balinese Spa Session
Access to Luxury Pool & Beach Clubs
All Local Taxes & Service Charges Included

samples.title: Curated Luxury Samples
samples.desc: Explore our hand-crafted, fully customizable sample itineraries designed exclusively for the Luxury Collection.

items.title: Elite Journeys (The Sapphire Edition)
items.highlights: Cultural Triangle, Highlanders & Coastal Heritage, Sigiriya Lion Rock, Hot Air Balloon, Aman Resorts, Private SUV

items.title: Wild Ceylon & Seclusion
items.highlights: Exclusive Wildlife Lodges, Private Leopard Safari in Yala (Relais & Châteaux), Seaplane Transfers, Boutique Beach Villa

items.title: The Imperial Helicopter Route
items.highlights: Charter Helicopter across the island, Ceylon Tea Trails Master Suite, Private Chef Dining, Private Catamaran
